memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Richard Woodruffe (Knight)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir. Richard Woodruffe
The County of Yorkshire, being not far from the Scottish border, was the scene of constant warfare between England and the Scots for almost 700 years. Richard grew up in a soldi …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Woodroffe於1440年出生在英國越可爾伍利時，他的父親Sir John Woodruffe24歲，母親Elizabeth Hamerton36歲。他於1470年與Jane Wortley在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年10月6日在英國薩默塞特伍利享年82歲，埋葬在英國越可爾衛克菲德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Woodroffe于1440年出生在英国越可爾伍利时，他的父亲Sir John Woodruffe24岁，母亲Elizabeth Hamerton36岁。他于1470年与Jane Wortley在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1522年10月6日在英国薩默塞特伍利享年82岁，埋葬在英国越可爾衛克菲德。

meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Wilde, wood, and rof, a roof

variants.name: Woodroff

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Woodroffe was born in 1440, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Woodruffe, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Hamerton, was 36. He married Jane Wortley in 1470, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 October 1522, in Woolley, Somerset, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Woodroffe est né en 1440, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Woodruffe, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hamerton, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Jane Wortley en 1470, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1522, à Woolley, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Woodroffe 1440 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Woodruffe 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hamerton 36. Er hat 1470 in Yorkshire, England Jane Wortley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Oktober 1522 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Woolley, Somerset, England und wurde in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Woodroffe è nato il nel 1440 nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Woodruffe, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hamerton, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Jane Wortley nel 1470, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 ottobre 1522, nel Woolley, Somerset, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Wakefield, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Woodroffeが1440年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Woodruffeは24歳，母Elizabeth Hamertonは36歳であった。1470年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJane Wortleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1522年10月6日にイギリスソメルセトウリーで82歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Woodroffe(이)가 1440년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Woodruffe(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hamerton(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 요르크실르에서 Jane Wortley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 10월 6일 영국 서머세트 보리에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 웨이크필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Woodroffe nasceu em 1440, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Woodruffe, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hamerton, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Wortley em 1470, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1522, em Woolley, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Woodroffe родился в 1440 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Woodruffe было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hamerton, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Wortley в 1470 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 октября 1522 г. в местности вулли, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Woodroffe nació en 1440, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Woodruffe, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hamerton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Jane Wortley en 1470, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1522, en Woolley, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
